name: Joseph-Celestine Donald
bio: One of the youngest recognized experts in his field, Joseph leads MKV Academy's core CAD and simulation curriculum, drawing on years of hands-on parametric modeling, workflow troubleshooting, and mentorship.

name: Diamond
bio: Diamond brings an electrical engineering lens to MKV's embedded systems and mechatronics tracks, helping students bridge mechanical design with real electrical constraints.

name: Simulation Studio Lead
bio: Leads simulation review sessions focused on stress analysis, mesh quality, design validation, and turning analysis results into practical engineering decisions.

name: Manufacturing Studio Lead
bio: Guides students through manufacturable design, production drawings, tolerance decisions, and the communication standards expected by workshops and suppliers.
